{{Quote|Sixtus Quin was a Special Intelligence Operative who was betrayed by his Imperial commander, so he helped us out in a mission on Tatooine.|Wedge Antilles|<ref name="X-Wing: The Bacta War">''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]''</ref>}}
'''Sixtus Quin''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Special Intelligence]] operative who later defected to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. He eventually left the Rebel Alliance and went into business with [[Elscol Loro]], forming an anti-Imperial [[Elscol Loro's anti-Imperial organization|mercenary organization]].

==Biography==
[[File:Sixtus.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Sixtus Quin]]

Quin and his elite squad left the Empire after being [[Tatooine Campaign|betrayed]] by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Marl Semtin/Legends|Marl Semtin]]. Sixtus killed Semtin at [[Eidolon Base]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], and his squad joined forces with former [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] pilot [[Elscol Loro]] to form an [[Elscol Loro's anti-Imperial organization|anti-Imperial mercenary group]].

Sixtus and Elscol would later be recruited by the members of Rogue Squadron in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]] after the Rogues left the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] to wage the [[Bacta War]] against [[Ysanne Isard]]. Sixtus, Elscol, [[Mirax Terrik Horn|Mirax Terrik]], [[Iella Wessiri Antilles|Iella Wessiri]], and [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] were inserted into [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]] to create a native [[Vratix/Legends|Vratix]] insurgency and defeat Isard's forces on the planet. Despite a skirmish at the spaceport and attacks on the Vratix by Isard's troops, Sixtus was able to create a formidable resistance force. Sixtus was part of a [[Ashern strike team|strike team]] that launched a [[Raid on the Dlarit estate|raid]] on the [[Dlarit estate]] to humiliate [[Erisi Dlarit]]'s father, [[Aerin Dlarit]]. As the Rogues and their allies engaged Isard's flagship ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]'' over Thyferra, Sixtus and the insurgents attacked Isard's headquarters, eventually capturing [[Fliry Vorru]], although Isard escaped in a shuttle. Ultimately, the Bacta War was a success and Isard was presumed killed.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[Michael A. Stackpole]] did not originally intend Sixtus to be black; he was made that way by [[John Nadeau]], the illustrator of ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Battleground: Tatooine]]''.<ref name="Handbook">[[Star Wars Handbook 1: X-Wing Rogue Squadron|''Star Wars Handbook'' 1: ''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'']]</ref>

Although his military rank is never given, according to his rank badge, Sixtus could have been either a [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] or a [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] during his time in the Imperial forces.
